ReportAlertLog.description: Firing and resolution history for widget report alerts

metric_snapshot.description: JSON snapshot of all metric values at firing time

conditions_snapshot.description: JSON snapshot of the conditions that fired

ReportAlerts.description: Widget alert subscriptions for report dashboards

widget_config_hash.description: Fingerprint of widget filter overrides and options for instance scoping

widget_filters.description: Serialized GlobalFilters (filterOverrides) for server-side metric evaluation

AiDailySummaries.description: AI-generated daily briefing per user, generated on first login of each day

summary_date.description: The calendar date this summary covers

role_context.description: Role used to generate this summary (admin, approver, creator)

key.description: Unique identifier: amount_outlier, vendor_spike, duplicate_pattern, state_age_risk, budget_burn_rate

ChatLastRead.description: Tracks last-read watermark per user per chat room

ReportLayouts.description: Grid layout positions for report widgets

stats_snapshot.description: Stat values at detection time: value, baseline_mean, baseline_stddev, sigma_score, sample_size, etc.

sender_name.description: Display name of the sender at the time of sending

read_by.description: Array of user UUIDs who have read this message

UserPresence.description: Tracks who is currently active in the application

divisions.description: Array of division short_names from user restrictions

regions.description: Array of region short_names from user restrictions

typing_room.description: Room the user is currently typing in; cleared when done typing

ReportWidgets.description: Widget instances belonging to a report
